name: claude-hooks-constraints
tags: constraints, fail-open, fast, pre_tool_use, exit code, degradation, prod mode, performance
body:
Hooks must be fast and fail-open.

**How to apply:**
- `pre_tool_use` must never exit 2 (block) on error — always degrade gracefully
- All hooks degrade silently in prod mode if the server is unreachable
- No hook path should block Claude on a slow DB query, network call, or exception
- New nodes must be benchmarked — UPS target is under 300ms end-to-end
